## [06:04 - 09:05]

So there's the follow your bliss method. That's a term by Joseph Campbell who's someone who I've studied, great author Joseph Campbell. And he has this term follow your bliss. So in other words, that's like talk, you know, you can teach people about stuff that you love or you can say the other side of the coin is you can be a mercenary. Now I've tended to teach to be in that first follow your bliss method. Like, you know, I love the stock market. I love marketing. So I teach about these things I love. ## [09:05 - 09:48]

You want to be really careful. You want to find a market where people are already successfully selling stuff in that market and then you just want to be better than them. It's that simple.
